name: happyeats-lume
description: HappyEats rebuilt natively in Lume — the deterministic natural-language programming language. Features AI-native menu digitization, health cert validation, and order management using Lume's ask/think keywords, self-sustaining runtime blocks (monitor/heal/optimize), and compile-time Lume-V trust certificates. A DarkWave Studios LLC production.
author: DarkWave Studios LLC
